text: Fritz's favorite for casual family nights out. Doro wat is a benchmark.
Best date night in Decatur. Omakase is worth the price. Diane loved it.
Pick up the dinner rolls when hosting the neighborhood dinner. Never fails.
Where to go for specialty ingredients. Best Ethiopian spices and Japanese produce in Atlanta.
Ethiopian Yirgacheffe on the shelf usually. Grinder can be inconsistent on batches.
